# CWE-393 safe: Return of Wrong Status Code (mitigated, pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-393-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
)

func ReplyAccountBalance(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, db *sql.DB) {
	accountID := r.URL.Query().Get("id")
	if accountID == "" {
		w.WriteHeader(http.StatusBadRequest)
		w.Write([]byte(`{"error":"id required"}`))
		return
	}
	var balance float64
	err := db.QueryRow("SELECT balance FROM accounts WHERE id = ?", accountID).Scan(&balance)
	if err != nil {
		w.WriteHeader(http.StatusInternalServerError)
		w.Write([]byte(`{"error":"lookup failed"}`))
		return
	}
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	payload, _ := json.Marshal(map[string]float64{"balance": balance})
	w.Write(payload)
}
